title: Runology
description: A magic mod about harnessing a reality bending power using runes
body:
Runology is a magic mod about harnessing a reality bending power known as "Shattered Flow" using runes, 1.21+ is an overhauled version of the mod however it is rather small currently

To begin this mod, you must find a Shatter then drop a book nearby it to obtain the Runic Codex, This is the guidebook for the mod

While the mod is small, it is still powerful, balancing will be done over time and the more that is added, the more spread out the power will be

You may use this mod in modpacks
